description: Ground truth for LLM verdict accuracy testing

cases.rationale: Classic reentrancy vulnerability - external call before state update with no reentrancy guard. This is exploitable.
Has nonReentrant modifier that prevents reentrancy. The pattern flagged the code structure but the modifier makes it safe.
Missing access control on privileged function. Anyone can call setOwner and take ownership.
Has onlyOwner modifier with proper implementation. The pattern flagged privileged state modification but access is restricted.
